I will retain a passive investment interest in GCP. I will also retain my carried interest in Greene Lyon, Nucleated Foam Technology, and Collegiate Sports Management. The terms (9% of profits over 1.25x original investment) are fixed, and payment will be made when the terms are met. (2020-01-01)
I will resign as co-managing member and become a passive investor in this LLC upon confirmation. The LLC will not acquire new investments during my appointment. (2025-06-01)

General Electric Aerospace AEIP
I will continue to receive payments from the AEIP through February 2027. The payments draw down a fixed cash receivable. (2003-02-01)
I will retain my vested stock options. (2023-09-01)

I am eligible to receive new grants of restricted stock units. Any unvested restricted stock units will vest at separation pursuant to company policy. Restricted stock units convert to stock upon vesting. (2023-09-01)
